mapper.sql: ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, DlvEntire, TransFee, TransChannel, DlvSite, DlvType, ContractNo, QuotationNo, Remark, OpLog, WorkDay, Sendout, Status, SendDay, ROrderItem, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, DlvDate, RcvClassify, PrjCode, StockCode, CProductNo, OrdTransType, SpcPrice, Discount, NoPrice, Account, SpecMark, RecNo, DetailMark, OptDate, rowguid, EmpSale, EmpOffice, DeptNo, PurchaseNo, Shikomi, Price_EndUser, cttFlag, WarehouseSendDate, CProductName, OptRecord, PreSaleOrderNo, Opponent, TypeCode, PriceChecked, EPrice, TradeCompanyId, OrderSourceSys
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._ordersales_bj
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._ordersales_bj (ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, DlvEntire, TransFee, TransChannel, DlvSite, DlvType, ContractNo, QuotationNo, Remark, OpLog, WorkDay, Sendout, Status, update dbo._ordersales_bj
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvEntire = #{record.dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransChannel = #{record.transchannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OpLog = #{record.oplog,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WorkDay = #{record.workday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Sendout = #{record.sendout,jdbcType=CHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=CHAR},
SendDay = #{record.sendday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ROrderItem = #{record.rorderitem,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvClassify = #{record.rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CProductNo = #{record.cproductno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OrdTransType = #{record.ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpcPrice = #{record.spcprice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
NoPrice = #{record.noprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
Account = #{record.account,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SpecMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
RecNo = #{record.recno,jdbcType=CHAR},
DetailMark = #{record.detailmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
rowguid = #{record.rowguid,jdbcType=CHAR},
EmpSale = #{record.empsale,jdbcType=CHAR},
EmpOffice = #{record.empoffice,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=CHAR},
PurchaseNo = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Shikomi = #{record.shikomi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Price_EndUser = #{record.priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
cttFlag = #{record.cttflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
WarehouseSendDate = #{record.warehousesenddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CProductName = #{record.cproductname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OptRecord = #{record.optrecord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PreSaleOrderNo = #{record.presaleorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Opponent = #{record.opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TypeCode = #{record.typecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PriceChecked = #{record.pricechecked,jdbcType=BIT},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrderSourceSys = #{record.ordersourcesys,jdbcType=CHAR},
